description:
Your company Meridian Solutions is launching a new branch office in Manchester. Complete the full HR infrastructure setup in AttendHRM.

Create the Manchester branch (code MAN, address: 25 Deansgate, Manchester M3 4LQ, phone: 0161-555-0142, email: manchester@meridian-solutions.com). Set up a work shift 'Manchester Standard' with hours 09:00 to 17:30, and a week-off pattern 'Manchester Weekly' with Saturday and Sunday off for all 5 weeks, Monday through Friday working. Configure a leave policy 'Manchester Staff Leave 2025' with three entitlements: Casual Leave (12 days, no carry-forward), Sick Leave (8 days, no carry-forward), and Earned Leave (15 days, with carry-forward). Transfer employees Reid Ryan and Jessica Owens to the Manchester branch, and record their first-day attendance on 03-Mar-2025 with in-time 09:00 and out-time 17:30.

Login credentials: Username 'admin', Password 'admin' (Demo database).
